since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.98%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.88% · Gold +1.18% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.98%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.98%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +4.17%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +4.17%, KLAC +3.84%, AMAT +3.77%, LRCX +3.64%, MRVL +3.54%. Laggards: CRM -2.59%, NOW -1.61%, ADBE -1.53%, EQIX -1.44%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.47% at $150.49
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
